title: Offline Nametag Icon
description: A mod to add customizable nametag icon or badge to your player.
body:
# Offline Nametag Icon
A mod to add Nametag Icons / Badges to your own player just like in popular pvp clients. Works with offline accounts aswell.

#### *TO SEE YOUR OWN NAMETAG WITH THE ICON, [WHO AM I](https://modrinth.com/mod/whoami) MOD IS REQUIRED
![Preview In-Game](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/bxqsTc3n/images/bc039032521da3124fcc89ffd60557600e9e422d.png)

## How to customize the Icon
Download the tempelate from [here](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/offline-nametag-icon-tempelate) and edit `assets\minecraft\offlinenametagicon\badge.png` as you like and put it in the game.

<hr>

_This project is under the [DSMSLv2 License](https://github.com/fspofficial/offline-nametag-icon/blob/main/LICENSE.md), made in india btw_ 🇮🇳
